name: Impressive Vietnam for Lovers 10 days
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Cai Be - Mekong Delta - Hoi An - Hanoi - Lan Ha Bay
highlights: Dive into the vibrant energy and rich history of Ho Chi Minh City, where modern skyscrapers coexist with ancient temples and bustling markets.
Embark on a scenic journey along the winding waterways of the Mekong Delta, a lush region known as the "rice bowl" of Vietnam.
Join a hands-on cooking class to learn to prepare authentic Vietnamese dishes.
Set sail on a breathtaking cruise through the pristine waters of Lan Ha Bay.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Arrival
itinerary.description:
Upon arrival at Tan Son Nhat Airport, the tour guide will welcome you and transfer you to the hotel to check in. NOTE: The time for check-in is 14:00, if you prefer to check in early, please contact your travel consultant. Relax after the flight or start to glimpse Saigon life through a meaningful show: 

Must See Cultural A O Show Saigon Ticket

	

FROM US $32 /pax
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Tour & Romantic Sunset Cruise (Join Cruise)
itinerary.description:
Morning

After you enjoy breakfast at the hotel, our friendly tour guide will come to the hotel and take you with your partner to explore the Saigon half-day city tour. Our first attraction is the Reunification Palace. This was the residence and working place of the President of the Republic of Vietnam in the past. The site welcomes many heads of state and high-ranking officials of the countries to visit. The War Remnants Museum, which represents important war events in history, maintains more than 20,000 pieces of evidence, including documentation, objects, and films, relating to crimes and t...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Private Cai Be Princess Cruise To Mekong Delta
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start a new day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel. Check out the hotel and be ready to be picked up for the Mekong River Delta trip. Arrive at the Cai Be Jetty at 10:00. As the sampan sets off on a leisurely ride across the busy rivers of the Mekong Delta, we will provide you with cold towels and a cool beverage. There is a great opportunity to see a range of watercraft as you go down the river, from little fishing boats to cargo barges loaded with fruits and vegetables
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Free day Ho Chi Minh - Flight to Da Nang - Hoi An
itinerary.description: After having a free morning in Ho Chi Minh City, let’s pack up and get ready for a flight to Da Nang Airport, then our driver will transfer you to your hotel in Hoi An to check in. Feel free to spend the afternoon wandering around this historic town with your partner.

itinerary.title: Enjoy Cooking Class Together - My Son Sanctuary
itinerary.description:
Morning

Kick off the morning by having a full breakfast in Hoi An. Our tour guide will pick you up at Hai Scout Café and start your cooking class at Red Bridge Cooking School. You will learn more about fresh Vietnamese ingredients and how to cook good local dishes. After making the food by yourself, enjoy the food product decorated with art carvings on a plate. Return to the hotel to unwind and prepare for the afternoon tour

itinerary.title: Hoi An Free Day - Romantic Sunset Dinner Cruise (Join Cruise)
itinerary.description:
Morning 

After having breakfast at the hotel, today is the day to save your best Hoi An memories. Tourists can consider taking some of our optional choices to explore every corner of the ancient city. Cam Thanh Coconut Village Basket Boat Tour

	

FROM US $44/ pax




Life as A Farmer in Cam Thanh Village

	

FROM US $79/ pax

Evening

Please stay at Pier opposite 76 Bach Dang at the check-in time is around 16:45. The captain and the crew will greet you on the boat and the hottest will escort you to your private table with a welcome cocktail and an amuse-bouche are served upon boarding. The c...

itinerary.title: Da Nang - Flight to Hanoi - Hanoi Sunset Biking & Food Tour Half day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy the breakfast and check out at the hotel. The driver will transfer you to Da Nang Airport for a flight to Hanoi. Afternoon

Our guide will welcome you to the airport and take you to the hotel in Hanoi. After resting for a short time, let’s explore Hanoi sunset biking with a food tour at around 16:00. You will come to the bicycle parking, select the appropriate one and start your biking tour

itinerary.title: Lan Ha Bay Overnight Romantic Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have a full of energy with breakfast and start checking out to reach the last destination. A shuttle bus/limousine will pick you up from the hotel to Ha Long Bay, the natural wonders worthy of being called a World Heritage site. At around 12:00, when boarding the cruise, you will enjoy the welcome drink and listen to the captain's introduction about the safety and cruise instructions. Then your couple can spend time savoring the lunch while admiring famous islets outside. Afternoon

It is the perfect time for interesting activities like kayaking or swimming in the crystal water

itinerary.title: Lan Ha Bay - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

On this second day, let’s have the Tai Chi session in the early morning, have a light breakfast while witnessing the beautiful sunrise and enjoy the rest morning of relaxation. You and your partner will taste the brunch on board and check out while cruising back to the pier. Afternoon

A shuttle bus/limousine will transfer you from the pier to back to the hotel in Hanoi for resting. Freely on the last night in Hanoi.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

Relish the last breakfast at the hotel in Hanoi and check out before 12:00. Our driver will take you to the airport for your departure flight. It is BestPrice Travel's honor to accompany you on your love journey in 10 days. We hope you gain the most dreamy memories with your love and have a safe flight!

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and homestay (if any)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
